_note: Placeholder values. Run benchmarks and update with real measurements. Absolute ceilings left null until first real baseline.

FullSolutionIngestion.description: Full solution ingestion (forceFullReingest=true). Measures PERF-01 latency and PERF-02 memory.

IncrementalNoChange.description: Incremental ingest with no changes. Second pass should exercise skip path.

ColdWorkspaceOpen.description: Raw MSBuildWorkspace.Create() + OpenSolutionAsync() latency without ingestion pipeline.
